scripts.build: emcc -O3 -s WASM=1 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['cwrap','ccall','getValue','setValue','stringToUTF8','UTF8ToString'] -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_dicom_parse','_dicom_get_pixel_data','_dicom_get_metadata','_dicom_free'] -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s MAXIMUM_MEMORY=4GB -I./include src/dicom_parser.cpp -o dist/dicom_parser.js --post-js src/post.js
scripts.build:debug: emcc -g4 -s WASM=1 -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS=['cwrap','ccall','getValue','setValue','stringToUTF8','UTF8ToString'] -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS=['_malloc','_free','_dicom_parse','_dicom_get_pixel_data','_dicom_get_metadata','_dicom_free'] -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s MAXIMUM_MEMORY=4GB -I./include src/dicom_parser.cpp -o dist/dicom_parser.js --post-js src/post.js
